title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Virgin Heating Ltd
body: "Application number 5149  Applicant Virgin Enterprises Limited objected to the name used by Virgin Heating Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 4 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Virgin Heating Ltd is changed to 15654172, LTD. "
